text.title: Seven Performance Domains (PMBOK 8) Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs a symptom (observable signal) with root cause and concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Domain has no accountable owner; status drifts to green regardless of reality.
antipattern.root-cause: owner field empty or shared on multiple domains without note
antipattern.fix: Assign one owner; document if same person holds multiple.

antipattern.symptom: Communications assumed automatic after absorption into Stakeholders.
antipattern.fix: Author an explicit comms plan within Stakeholders domain.

antipattern.symptom: Deliverables shipped are reported as value realised.
antipattern.root-cause: value-realisation rate undefined or = delivery rate
antipattern.fix: Define outcomes separately from outputs; report both.
